name: Trillium Gold Mines Inc.
summary: Trillium Gold Mines Inc., a junior resource company, engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. The company explores for gold, copper, zinc, and silver deposits. Its flagship property is the Newman Todd gold project located in the Red Lake mining district of northern Ontario. Trillium Gold Mines Inc. also holds interests in properties located in the Confederation Lake and Birch-Uchi greenstone belts in the Red Lake District, as well as properties in Larder Lake, Ontario and in the Matagami and Chibougamou areas of Quebec. The company was formerly known as Confederation Minerals Ltd. and changed its name to Trillium Gold Mines Inc. in June 2020. Trillium Gold Mines Inc. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
